about.title: About
about.subtitle: Test Automation Engineer &
about.bio1: I'm {name} — or as most people know me, {alias}. In French, the letters {M} and {J} are pronounced {emPronounce} and {jiPronounce} — my initials from {matondo} {julien}.
about.bio2: An ISTQB-certified {role} with {years} of hands-on experience in enterprise test automation and AI-driven solutions.
about.bio3: I've worked with major organizations like {fluvius}, {inami}, and {devoteam}, delivering test automation frameworks that improved testing efficiency by {efficiency} and reduced bug escape rates by {bugReduction}.
about.bio4: My expertise spans {playwright}, {selenium}, {cypress}, and {cicd}. I also build AI-powered automation solutions using tools like n8n, Claude, and OpenAI.
about.bio5: I believe in {action} and {results}. Every solution I build is designed to solve real problems and deliver measurable quality improvements.

ada.title: ADA Systems Platform
ada.subtitle: Complete Restaurant Automation Ecosystem
ada.description: Built a comprehensive AI-powered platform for restaurant management, integrating menu management, staff scheduling, inventory tracking, and social media automation into a unified ecosystem.
ada.challenge: Restaurants face fragmented tooling for daily operations — separate systems for menus, staff scheduling, inventory, and marketing that don't communicate with each other. This leads to inefficiency, errors, and wasted time on administrative tasks.

solution.0: Developed AdaMenu for dynamic, real-time menu management with multi-language support
solution.1: Built AdaPlanning for intelligent staff scheduling with conflict resolution
solution.2: Created AdaStock for AI-powered inventory tracking with predictive analytics
solution.3: Implemented Postagen for automated social media content generation using GPT-4 Vision
solution.4: Integrated all services into a unified dashboard with centralized authentication

testing.title: Enterprise Test Automation
testing.subtitle: Government & Financial Services QA Transformation
testing.description: Led test automation initiatives for major Belgian government and enterprise organizations, migrating legacy manual testing to modern automated frameworks and CI/CD pipelines.
testing.challenge: Large organizations relied heavily on manual testing processes that were slow, error-prone, and couldn't scale with increasing development velocity. Legacy Selenium frameworks needed modernization, and test management processes lacked proper integration with development workflows.

solution.0: Led Selenium to Playwright migration for improved reliability and speed
solution.1: Designed comprehensive E2E test automation frameworks with Page Object Model
solution.2: Implemented CI/CD integration with Jenkins and GitHub Actions
solution.3: Set up test management with XRAY and JIRA for full traceability
solution.4: Established BDD practices with Cucumber/Gherkin for stakeholder collaboration
solution.5: Created performance testing strategies with JMeter
